goal_summary: Convert Sarah Broderick's opened quote for a May 15 party into a scheduled 10-minute phone call with Andre by collecting venue/address, food-ready time, service fit, and phone number.
lead_state_summary: Sarah asked for catering for a May 15 party for about 25 people, specifically mainly Brazilian appetizers with some meat and rice. Andre has already sent menus/packages, service-style education, tasting information, a ballpark quote for Full Churrasco and Deluxe Churrasco, and a follow-up saying she can call anytime. Sarah opened the first package email and opened the ballpark quote. There is no reply, no phone number, and the opportunity is still flagged NEEDS VENUE NAME.
known_facts: Sarah Broderick started a live chat on 2026-05-05 around 7:30 PM.
The event is a party for around 25 people.
Sarah asked for mainly Brazilian appetizers, with some meat and rice.
No phone number is present in the lead record.
The opportunity custom field flags NEEDS VENUE NAME.
Andre sent menus/packages and service-style information.
Sarah opened the package email and opened the ballpark quote email.
There are no captured inbound replies after Andre's emails.
unknowns: Venue name/address or at least city.
Whether Sarah wants drop-off trays, staffed buffet, or churrasco-style service.
Best phone number for Andre to call.
Whether the Full Churrasco / Deluxe Churrasco quote direction matched what Sarah imagined.
Dietary restrictions, setup constraints, and delivery/access details.
best_next_question: What venue/address and food-ready time should Andre plan around, and what phone number should he call to confirm the best option for 25 guests?

days.objective: Turn Sarah's opened quote into a tiny reply that gives Andre the practical details needed for a useful call.

required_actions.intent: Ask for venue/address, food-ready time, phone number, and permission for Andre to call today or tomorrow.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Quick call for your May 15 party?

Hi Sarah,

I saw you had a chance to look at the ballpark for the May 15 party, so I want to make the next step easy.

Before Andre locks in whether that Full Churrasco / Deluxe Churrasco direction is the right fit, can you send me these three quick details?

1. The venue/address or city
2. What time you want food ready for guests
3. The best phone number for Andre to call

Since the event is next Friday and you're looking for Brazilian appetizers with some meat and rice for about 25 people, a quick 10-minute call is probably the cleanest way to confirm the format and avoid sending you more generic info.

Would Andre be able to call you today or tomorrow?

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: Do not include another menu link. She already opened the package email and quote. This message should convert interest into logistics.

days.objective: If Sarah does not reply, reduce the ask to a binary service-style choice and connect it to a call.

required_actions.intent: Ask whether she pictures drop-off/trays or staffed/churrasco-style service.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Should we build this as drop-off or staffed service?

Hi Sarah,

Quick question so Andre can point you in the right direction for May 15:

Are you picturing this more as:

1. Drop-off / trays for a casual party, or
2. Staffed buffet / churrasco-style service with the food managed on-site?

Either can work depending on the venue and timing. If you send the venue/address and a good phone number, Andre can call for 10 minutes and tell you which option makes the most sense for 25 guests.

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: This avoids pushing the higher-service option if Sarah really wanted appetizer-heavy drop-off.

days.objective: If she opens but still does not reply, use a NEPQ fit question to reveal whether the quote matched her mental picture.

required_actions.intent: Ask whether she wants a lighter appetizer-heavy party menu or a full-meal feel.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Is the quote direction close?

Hi Sarah,

One thing I want to check before Andre keeps building around the quote:

When you said mainly Brazilian appetizers with some meat and rice, were you hoping for more of a lighter appetizer-heavy party menu, or closer to a full meal for everyone?

That changes the best recommendation. If the quote direction feels close, Andre can call you and tighten it around the venue, serve time, and the exact menu mix.

What would be the best number for him to reach you?

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: This proves we heard Sarah's exact food request and gives her a safe way to say the quote was too heavy or not aligned.

days.objective: Create respectful urgency around the May 15 date and ask for a yes/no on continuing.

required_actions.intent: Ask whether Andre should still help or whether Sarah went another direction.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: May 15 timing check

Hi Sarah,

Because your party is on May 15, I don't want to leave you hanging if we're not the right fit.

Should Andre still help you tighten this up, or did you decide to go another direction?

If you do want help, just send:

- Venue/address
- Food-ready time
- Best phone number

Then Andre can call and tell you plainly what is doable for 25 guests.

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: Give Sarah permission to say no. A real buyer often replies when the pressure is framed respectfully.

days.objective: Run a manual recovery check for missing Crisp/live-chat context, then send one more logistics-first email if no phone is found.

required_actions.intent: Check Crisp chat for missing phone/address/context; call if a phone exists.
required_actions.draft_seed: Open the Crisp chat link from the lead record and check whether Sarah gave any extra context that did not make it into Close: address/city, phone number, exact serve time, service style, budget, or dietary/setup notes. If a phone number exists in Crisp, call Sarah once. If there is still no phone, send the fallback email.
required_actions.notes: The Close record has a Crisp link, and the lead started through live chat. This is the only plausible place a missing phone/context detail might exist.

required_actions.intent: Fallback email asking for the last details needed to make May 15 work.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Last details needed to make May 15 work

Hi Sarah,

I'm checking once more because the May 15 date is close.

Andre can help you confirm whether the Brazilian appetizers + meat/rice plan works, but he needs the venue/address and food-ready time before he can give you a reliable next step.

If you still want help, reply with:

1. Address/city
2. Food-ready time
3. Phone number

If not, no worries at all — I just don't want to keep nudging you if you're already set.

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: Only send the fallback if the manual Crisp check does not reveal a phone number or better next action.

days.send_window: Task during business hours; fallback email after manual check.

days.objective: Give Sarah a useful reason to reply by framing the call as the shortest path through the decision.

required_actions.intent: Explain the simplest planning path for 25 guests and ask for phone/address.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Easiest way to plan this for 25

Hi Sarah,

For a party of about 25, the simplest planning path is usually:

1. Confirm whether you want light appetizers or a full-meal feel
2. Confirm where the food is going and when it needs to be ready
3. Have Andre recommend the cleanest package from there

That's why I'm trying to get you onto a quick call instead of sending more PDFs.

If you want, reply with your phone number and the venue/address, and Andre can help you make the decision quickly.

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: This frames the call as a shortcut, not a sales appointment.

days.objective: Close the loop so Andre either gets the call or stops spending active attention on the May 15 opportunity.

required_actions.intent: Ask whether to close the loop or help with the May 15 party.
required_actions.draft_seed:
Subject: Should I close this out?

Hi Sarah,

I don't want to crowd your inbox.

Should I close this out on our side, or would you still like Andre to help with the May 15 party?

If yes, send the best phone number and venue/address, and he can call you for a quick final fit check.

Andre / Comeketo
required_actions.notes: If she opens this and still does not reply, stop active outreach unless new inbound activity appears.

stop_conditions.trigger: Sarah replies with phone number and venue/address.
stop_conditions.action: pause cadence and create same-day call task for Andre

stop_conditions.trigger: Sarah replies with venue/address but no phone number.
stop_conditions.action: ask for phone number and offer two concrete call windows

stop_conditions.trigger: Sarah says the quote is too high.
stop_conditions.action: ask whether she wanted a lighter appetizer-heavy plan or a strict budget target; do not defend the quote

stop_conditions.trigger: Sarah says she only wants drop-off.
stop_conditions.action: route toward a simpler appetizer/tray plan and confirm delivery feasibility

stop_conditions.trigger: Sarah is not interested or already booked someone else.

stop_conditions.action: create call task, mark scheduled_call objective achieved, and stop remaining days
